arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 'revolutionary' super stadium plans involved shock move away
arts.sum: As club historian Paul Joannou detailed, in Fortress St James', the site was inspected, concepts were drawn up for a £1m'super stadium' and, by 1968, the club applied for planning permission through Northumberland County Council, which Gosforth fell under at the time. The club were granted planning permission to build a new stadium in Gosforth several decades ago.

arts.ttl: Castore's Newcastle United dig as they hail 'transformational' Rangers kit deal for £1bn fortune
arts.sum: Castore, the sportswear brand, has credited its partnership with Rangers as being pivotal to its succes - while having a dig at Premier League clubs that they have partnered up with in the past. The company was Newcastle United's kit provider for just three years, before the Magpies brought a premature end to the deal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United prepare new contract for Callum Wilson as striker's importance underlined
arts.sum: Callum Wilson is in line to win a new contract at Newcastle United and could be part of the Toon squad again next season - according to Eddie Howe. Howe knows that he has a small squad at Newcastle going into the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Player’s admission ‘enough to put an end’ to Newcastle United transfer links
arts.sum: Bruno Guimarães moved from Lyon to Newcastle United in January 2022 and the Brazilian midfielder has impressed regularly for the Magpies. Eddie Howe’s side have been keeping an eye on another Brazilian from the Ligue 1 club. On Friday, we covered claims from Brazil which stated Newcastle failed to sign Lyon’s Lucas Perri in the The post Player’s admission ‘enough to put an end’ to Newcastle United transfer links appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Birmingham vs Newcastle preview: Botman out with knee injury
arts.sum: “As I’ve said many times, we don’t have a huge squad in terms of depth, especially with a couple of the injuries we’ve picked up with Sven missing and Joelinton out, but we’ll try and pick a team that’s strong enough to win and give other opportunities to other players. Botman was a key cog in the Magpies’ Carabao Cup semi-final victory on Wednesday, coming in to replace injured midfielder Joelinton as part of a back three, and although he was withdrawn in the 80th minute due to a knock, Eddie Howe does not believe the injury is too serious.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to be given exciting £60m transfer opportunity
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly set to be given the opportunity to seal the transfer of Galatasaray’s on-loan Napoli striker Victor Osimhen for £60m this summer. The Nigeria international has shone on loan in Turkey this season, scoring 17 goals in 22 games so far, and one imagines he’ll surely be on his way to a […] The post Newcastle United to be given exciting £60m transfer opportunity appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea & Newcastle could be set for transfer battle over 26-year-old Premier League star
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United are reportedly among the clubs interested in the potential summer transfer of Liverpool goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher. The Republic of Ireland international has performed well as a reliable backup option for Liverpool, but it seems unlikely that he’s ever going to quite manage to become the Reds’ number one. Alisson Becker has […] The post Chelsea & Newcastle could be set for transfer battle over 26-year-old Premier League star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Birmingham vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking to follow up their midweek Carabao Cup success by beating League One promotion favourites, and Tom Brady-backed, Birmingham City in the FA Cup fourth round on Saturday. Chris Davies is likely to field a similar lineup to the one that toppled Stevenage in League One on Tuesday evening, with Newcastle having to keep close tabs on former Fulham man Jay Stansfield up front.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United offered Victor Osimhen for shock cut-price transfer fee
arts.sum: Incredibly, Osimhen was left with no club in any of the top Euro leagues and ended up on loan at Galatasaray with the Turkish Lig offering him a lifeline with most other transfer windows closed. Newcastle United will be offered the chance again to land explosive striker Victor Osimhen again this summer with Napoli keen to offload the Nigeria star.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United submit telling document to Premier League with two new signings confirmed
arts.sum: Newcastle United have included new signings Baran Yildiz and Kyle Fitzgerald in their Premier League squad for the second half of the 2024/25 season. It includes five goalkeepers and just 19 outfield players including injured duo Jamaal Lascelles and Harvey Barnes meaning Eddie Howe's squad must hope that injuries do not cut into the squad in the final four months of the campaign.
